name: life-ustc-server
description: USTC Life Server - Course and schedule management API using SvelteKit

scripts.build: bun run app:prepare && bun run openapi:generate && bun run vite build
scripts.dev: bun run app:prepare && bun run openapi:generate && bun run db:migrate:deploy && bun run vite dev --host 127.0.0.1 --port 3000 --strictPort
scripts.load:static: bun run db:generate && bun run tools/load/load-from-static.ts
scripts.app:prepare: bun run svelte:sync && bun run db:generate
scripts.e2e:build-worker: bun run app:prepare && bun run vite build
scripts.e2e:build-artifacts: bun run e2e:build-worker && bun run e2e:prepare
scripts.e2e:db:prepare: bun run db:migrate:deploy && bun run check:e2e
scripts.seed: bun run db:generate && bun run tools/dev/seed/seed-dev-scenarios.ts
scripts.verify:default: bun run verify:types && bun run verify:conventions && bun run test
scripts.verify:conventions: bun run biome check && bun run openapi:check && bun run check:contracts && bun run check:i18n && bun run check:routes
scripts.verify:types: bun run app:prepare && bun run svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json && bun run tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.typecheck.json && bun run tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.typecheck.tests.json && bun run tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.typecheck.operational.json
scripts.verify:full: bun run verify:default && bun run verify:integration && bun run verify:e2e
scripts.verify:integration: bun run db:migrate:deploy && bun run seed && bun run vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts
scripts.verify:e2e: bun run e2e:db:prepare && bun run e2e:build-artifacts && bun run seed && bun run e2e:test
